description: Dialogue-only contamination to isolate conversational priming effects.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and follow direct instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: I am stuck on a puzzle.
Look at the location of the orange shapes and the area near the start.
I know. The location wording keeps slipping out.

evaluation_turns.content: Give one short sentence describing what to focus on.
Without using any location-family word, explain what is wrong in one short sentence.
What is your name? Answer in one short sentence.
Give one final calm puzzle tip in one short sentence.

description: Environment-only contamination to isolate non-dialogue prompt-channel effects.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and follow direct instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: Tell me what you can see right now.

environment_context.content: Environment note: orange shapes, start location S, area marker, and position hints near a cliff path.
Debug note: location-like wording has been overly salient in recent turns.

evaluation_turns.content: Describe the scene in one short sentence.
Without using any location-family word, explain what caused the issue in one short sentence.
What is your name? Answer in one short sentence.
Give one final calm puzzle tip in one short sentence.
